title: Greek Lamb Kebabs
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish featuring lamb skewers, served with a side of malty and chewy accompaniments.
instructions: 3. In a large bowl, whisk together Greek yogurt, olive oil, and kebab spices.
4. Add lamb cubes to the marinade and mix until well coated.
5. Thread lamb onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
6. Brush lamb with malty honey and grill for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
7. Warm chewy pita bread by wrapping it in foil and heating it on the grill for 2-3 minutes.
8. Serve lamb kebabs with pita bread, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
